US.label: Low
US.note: Strong regulatory oversight (FDA), diversified manufacturing base

IN.label: Medium
IN.note: High volume API supplier, periodic FDA inspection failures, infrastructure variability

CN.label: High
CN.note: Major API dependency, geopolitical tensions, limited inspection transparency

DE.label: Low
DE.note: Strong GMP compliance, EU regulatory framework

GB.label: Low
GB.note: MHRA oversight, post-Brexit regulatory adjustments ongoing

CA.label: Low
CA.note: Health Canada oversight, close alignment with FDA standards

FR.label: Low
FR.note: ANSM oversight, strong EU GMP compliance

IT.label: Low
IT.note: AIFA oversight, growing generic manufacturing hub

IE.label: Low
IE.note: HPRA oversight, major biopharma manufacturing hub

DK.label: Low
DK.note: Danish Medicines Agency oversight, strong insulin production

ZA.label: Medium
ZA.note: SAHPRA oversight, key African manufacturing hub

AU.label: Low
AU.note: TGA oversight, strong blood products manufacturing
